objective: Evaluate whether a deployable adaptive budget router can recover most executable-program portfolio accuracy on Foofah-style table transformations at a much lower forward-token cost.
variant_order_selection: Greedy first-visible ordering on pilot train.
router_selection: Choose a public-feature trigger on pilot dev by accuracy, then direct-correct losses, then lower token cost; freeze before test.
primary_metric: Exact test accuracy vs total forward tokens.
deployable_features: visible-test pass and output agreement for generated program candidates that the policy pays to generate
